productDisplayName: Enamor Eclipse Coloured Reveal Bra HB60
description: White and blue printed brassiere, has medium coverage, wired under the cups for optimum support, plunging neckline, soft polyamide material, minimal padding to give a smooth look without adding to the cup size, bow detail on the straps and in between the cups, adjustable straps which are twin in front and single at the back and adjustable double hook and eye closure at the back Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
